steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states the program identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases and has already-strong performance that will improve further. These phrases signal consistent, successful operation.

steps.title: Match the word to the context
steps.content:
Reliably expresses consistent, dependable performance—exactly what the vast majority of cases and already-strong performance indicate. The other three either contradict the success rate (clumsily, rarely) or describe an irrelevant quality (slowly).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
